step_rationale: Sphingolipid mediator of plaque inflammation, monocyte migration, and atherothrombotic initiation.
mechanism: Lactosylceramide regulates monocyte recruitment and inflammatory signaling, bridging lipid retention and plaque inflammation.

references.title: Sphingolipids in Atherosclerosis: Chimeras in Structure and Function.
Lipidomics analysis of monocytes from patients with acute myocardial infarction reveals lactosylceramide as a new player in monocyte migration.
references.journal: FASEB journal : official publication of the Federation of American Societies for Experimental Biology

references.title: Race disparity in blood sphingolipidomics associated with lupus cardiovascular comorbidity.
